canonical_definition: A challenging benchmark for pretraining data detection that contains "seen" and "unseen" text samples from the Pile dataset, specifically constructed to have high n-gram overlap between classes.
papers: Infilling Score: A Pretraining Data Detection Algorithm for Large Language Models
Min-K%++: Improved Baseline for Pre-Training Data Detection from Large Language Models

definitions.text: A challenging benchmark for pretraining data detection that contains "seen" and "unseen" text samples from the Pile dataset, specifically constructed to have high n-gram overlap between classes.
definitions.paper: Infilling Score: A Pretraining Data Detection Algorithm for Large Language Models

relationships.paper: Min-K%++: Improved Baseline for Pre-Training Data Detection from Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: We focus on two benchmarks (and the only two to our knowledge) for pre-training data detection, WikiMIA (Shi et al., 2024) and MIMIR (Duan et al., 2024).

Infilling Score: A Pretraining Data Detection Algorithm for Large Language Models
